title: Circuit breaker in delivery worker prevents thundering herd to dead instances
description: The delivery worker in delivery.rs implements a per-domain circuit breaker (lines 22-68) that trips after 10 consecutive failures and stays tripped for 1 hour. On cooldown expiry, it resets the counter for a fresh retry window. This prevents the delivery worker from hammering dead Mastodon instances and wasting resources. The amortized design (reset after cooldown rather than gradual backoff) is simple and appropriate for this use case.
